titleStmt.title: SII 24.128: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 128. (A.R. No. 73 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Commences with the praśasti Kaḍal-śūḻnda pārmādarum, etc. Records an endowment of 1000 kāśu by Vīṟṟirundāṉ śēmaṉ alias Tirukkuṟaivaḷa[r*]tta Akaḷaṅka-Nāḍāḻvāṉ of Tiruttavattuṟai for conducting certain special festivals in the temple. (vide Nos. 129-131 below). The record is dated in the 9th year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kaṭal cūḻnta pārmātarum pūmātarum kalaimātarum Ayal cūḻnta pormātaruñ cirmātaru Amarntu vāḻa nāṟkaṭalcūḻ puvi Eḻum pāṟkaṭal pola pukaḻ
parappa Āti Ukamāmenṉac cotimuṭi puṉaintaruḷi Aṟucamaiyamum Aimpūtamum neṟiyil ṉinṟupacarippa teṉnavaruñ ceralaruñ ciṅkaḷaru mutalāya maṉna
varkaḷ vantiṟaiñci cevippa Ūḻi Ūḻi Oru ceṅkol Eḻupārum Initaḷippa cemponvirasiṅhā(taṉa)taṉattu Ulakuṭai mukkokiḻā naṭikaḷ ḷoṭum
viṟṟiruntaruḷiya ko Irācakecaripaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī rājātirāca tevaṟku yāṇṭu Onpatāvatu tiruttavattuṟai viṟṟiruntān cemanṉāṉa tiruk
kuṟaivaḷattaRead ‘vaḷartta’Akaḷaṅka nāṭāḻvār Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷukku tirunāḷkaḷ veṭṭait tirunāḷkaḷil � cātti Aruḷa perumāḷukku kuṭuttaruḷa puvi
nāḷ nālukkum koyil tirumaṭi vaṭapulattu Upaiyamāka śrī vaiṣṇavar kaḷil tiruvaraṅkavaḷḷa(l)lārum viṟṟiruntān ni m tiruccittirakūṭatātarum periya koyil rum tiruk
kaḻakapparum kantāṭai tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇanampiyum kārampi ceṭṭu Aṇiyaraṅkatātarum Iṭavai tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇanampiyum Irācamentira nampiyum muṅkiṟkuṭi cikurukūr nampiyum tirukkūfor ku
ṟuṅkuṭi nampiyum periya koyil tātarum Arumāri tātarum caṭakopa piriyarum Uḷḷiṭṭārum tiruvaraṅkattu capaiyāril Ārā Amutu puṇṭarika nampiyum Āritan cirākavan cirāmapaṭṭa(n)num kavuṇiyan Āḷ
koṇṭa villi paṭṭa(n)num pāratāyan puruṣottama paṭṭannum pāratāyan ciriḷaṅ kopaṭṭa(n)num Ilacciṉaikkāṇi Āriyan viṣṇupaṭṭa(n)num kovinta paṭṭanum Uḷḷūr poṟpaṇṭāri pirā
nta pāratāyan Āṇṭa piḷḷai vaṭako camanta poṟ paṇṭāri ṇṇa tāmaraik kiruṣṇa paṭṭa(n)num civaiyiṣṇavak kāṇi
caṭakopatātarum koyil kaṇakku koṟṟa maṅkalamuṭai mācaṟu cotiyāṉa periya koyil piriya(n)num tiruvaṭivaḷavak kaṇkāṇi
tiruvāymoḻitātarum tiruvaṭivaḷavap paṇṭuka kapirānampiyārum Iv vaṉaivom kaṇkāṇiyāka cāttum ttu tiru pariyaṭṭaṅ koḷḷa Upaiya
mā Iru nūṟṟeṇ mutal Oṭukkiṉa kācu Āyiram Ikkācu Āyirattukku māta mutalukku nūṟṟin vāyi Onṟaraik kācāka vanta palicai poli vatākavum ponta palicai
yāl mutalāna(nā) kācu � tirunāḷkaḷum vaikunta tirunāḷum tiruveṭṭaināḷ nālum ceyvār yār cātti Aru(ḷ)ḷi perumāḷukku
kaṭavatāka Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ runtān cemannāṉa tirukkuṟaivaḷattaRead “vaḷartta” Akaḷaṅka nāṭāḻvā naṭiyāka cellak kaṭavatāka sammatittu kalveṭṭikuṭuttom .
Digital edition of SII 24.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
